conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That's great to hear. What's been going on in your life lately? Any big changes or stressors that have come up recently?
Honestly, work has been a real challenge. I've just started this new job and the expectations are really high.
I see. So it sounds like there might be some pressure at work. Can you tell me more about what's going on there?
Yeah, my team is really counting on me to perform well and I'm struggling to keep up with the workload.
That can be tough. Are you finding time for anything outside of work that brings you joy or relaxation?
Not really. I mean, I've been trying to get into some hobbies but it's hard to find the energy.
I understand. Sometimes our routines and habits can be affected when we're stressed. Have you noticed any changes in your sleep patterns recently?
Yeah, I've been having trouble sleeping every other night. And even on the nights I do sleep well, I wake up feeling tired and groggy.
That sounds exhausting. How about your appetite? Has that changed at all?
Honestly, I've been eating a lot more than usual. Like, way too much.
That can be concerning. Have you noticed any changes in your interest or motivation levels lately?
No, actually. I feel pretty apathetic most of the time now. It's like nothing really excites me anymore.
That sounds tough. Can you think back to when things were going well and you felt more engaged? What was happening then?
I guess it was when I first started my job and everything was new and exciting. I had a sense of purpose, you know?
Yeah, that makes sense. So maybe we can explore ways to recapture some of that sense of purpose or excitement.
That would be great, thanks.
Of course! Let's keep exploring. Have you noticed any physical sensations or body feelings lately? Like tension or aches?
Actually, yeah. I've been getting these weird pains in my stomach whenever I'm stressed.
Hmm, that sounds uncomfortable. How about social life and relationships? Are there any changes you've noticed recently?
Honestly, I've just felt really disconnected from everyone lately. Like, even small talk feels like too much effort.
That can be isolating. Have you had any recent stressful life events or significant changes that might have contributed to this feeling?
Yeah, actually. My best friend moved away a few months ago and I'm still getting used to the distance.
Ah, that makes sense. Sometimes losing a close connection can really affect our emotional state. Have you noticed any feelings of guilt or regret lately?
All the time! Like, I feel like I should be doing more or achieving more in my life.
It sounds like there's some pressure to perform even when you're not feeling up to it. Can we explore what that feels like for you a bit more?
Yeah... it's just really hard to shake the feeling that I'm failing at everything.
That can be overwhelming. Have you thought about talking to anyone about how you're feeling, or is this something you've been keeping to yourself?
Honestly, yeah. Just my mom. She's always worried about me, but even with her support, it feels like I'm just not doing enough.

It sounds like you might be carrying a lot of weight on your shoulders. What are some things that make you feel good, even if they're small? Can we work towards incorporating those into your daily routine?
Yeah... actually, thinking about going for walks in the park again. I used to love that.
That's great! Maybe we can start with little steps like that. What are some goals you might have for this session or our next few sessions together?
Honestly? Just feeling a little more grounded and less stuck, I guess.
That's a great place to start. We'll work on building some momentum towards that.
